mapper.select: SELECT promotion_id AS promotionId, COUNT(*) AS orderCount, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS rechargeAmount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN is_first_recharge = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS firstRechargeCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN is_first_recharge = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS repeatRechargeCount FROM recharge_orders WHERE DATE(created_at) = #{date} GROUP BY promotion_id
